buggy_variants.description: Uses exclusive lower bound, dropping boundary events one step too early
Rejects equal timestamps on add instead of allowing non-decreasing order
Allows querying past time, violating monotonic query invariant
Default total() uses last queried time instead of latest added timestamp
Prunes only on total/query, so add() can return sums including expired events
Disallows zero window_size only after init, accepting invalid negative by mistake
Advancing add at same timestamp re-prunes and can move last_time incorrectly
